signals.npcLine: Crypto tides shift; a wary market breathes uneasy.
signals.questPulse: Seek data fragments on rising digital unrest.
signals.worldFeed: Market cap creeps upward amid creeping distrust.
signals.clueEvent: Fear festers within the neon-lit exchanges.

signals.npcLine: Nodes flicker as Asteroid signals gain traction.
signals.questPulse: Trace noise spikes near the fringe protocols.
signals.worldFeed: Unknown assets stir beneath the caped markets.
signals.clueEvent: Trending tokens flicker, hinting at hidden moves.

signals.npcLine: PENGU whispers echo through shadowed data streams.
signals.questPulse: Decode silent exchanges before they vanish.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment sinks low; fear colors the blockchain.
signals.clueEvent: Fear index spikes, shadows follow the glow.

signals.npcLine: AAVE roots deepen while markets tense on edge.
signals.questPulse: Gather intel on asset shifts before dawn.
signals.worldFeed: Cryptic currents swirl in a restless network.
signals.clueEvent: Wakeful watchers note rising digital pulse.

signals.npcLine: RAVE fades to static in this jittered dawn.
signals.questPulse: Confirm silence in the fading signal waves.
signals.worldFeed: Silent tokens betray subtle market decay.
signals.clueEvent: Diminishing echoes mark the fraying code.
